expectations.text: CoSecConfigurer is used with proper configuration
expectations.evidence: Implementation uses CoSecConfigurer with appId, tokenStorage, deviceIdStorage, and tokenRefresher

expectations.text: TokenRefresher is properly configured with refresh function
expectations.evidence: tokenRefresher object has refresh method that exchanges refreshToken for new accessToken/refreshToken

expectations.text: JwtTokenManager or TokenStorage is configured for token persistence
expectations.evidence: TokenStorage is instantiated and passed to CoSecConfigurer for JWT token persistence in localStorage

expectations.text: SpaceIdProvider is configured for multi-tenant support
expectations.evidence: DefaultSpaceIdProvider is configured with spacedResourcePredicate and spaceIdStorage

expectations.text: Headers (CoSec-App-Id, CoSec-Device-Id, Authorization) are added to requests
expectations.evidence: CoSecConfigurer.applyTo(fetcher) adds all CoSec headers via CoSecRequestInterceptor and AuthorizationRequestInterceptor

claims.evidence: Code shows CoSecConfigurer constructor accepts all config options

claims.claim: Token refresh flow is documented in comments
claims.evidence: 6-step token refresh flow is documented in comments

eval_feedback.overall: All assertions pass. Implementation follows skill guidance correctly.
